title: BreakTheMod
description: Utility Mod for EarthMC - Part of BreakTheBot
body: BreakTheMod is a Minecraft mod that adds useful commands for enhanced multiplayer gameplay. With features like WhereIs, which allows you to locate other players on the map, and Nearby, which shows players within rendered chunks, it makes navigating the world and interacting with others easier. Compatible with Minecraft versions 1.20.4 and 1.21.1 on Fabric, this mod provides simple, yet effective tools for players. Perfect for enhancing your multiplayer experience!
